cards.label: VALUE PEAK
cards.headline: $2,450 / sq ft
cards.body: Sconset leads the island with the highest median price per square foot over the last 12 months.
cards.footnote: Privacy and bluff views still command the ultimate premium.

cards.label: MARKET VELOCITY
cards.headline: 92 days
cards.body: Median days on market for March/April sales dropped 22% from 118 days last year.
cards.footnote: The "wait and see" period is evaporating — buyers are moving faster.

cards.label: SUPPLY SATURATION
cards.headline: Mid-Island
cards.body: Highest inventory-to-sales ratio on the island — nearly 2.5× higher than coastal areas like Cisco or Surfside.
cards.footnote: If you're looking for choice, the center of the island currently offers the most options.

stephenNote: The premium coastal neighborhoods are firmly in seller territory. Interior locations — particularly Mid-Island — offer the best negotiating leverage for buyers this spring.
